expected_score_rule: Contract-test expected values are explicit in this artifact; generated tests MUST NOT infer missing score/band/risk behavior from prose.

deterministic_generation.recipe: Pass a non-JSON runtime object such as an open file handle in input_data. The public API must raise AnnotationQualityProgrammerError before any domain validation.

required_assertions: no failed JSON result is returned for unsafe programmer misuse
no filesystem or network access occurs
